name: Reflex Kitten Food Chicken & Rice 15kg
shortDescription: Give your kitten superior nourishment with Reflex Chicken Kitten Food — a balanced diet made with quality protein and nutrients to enhance growth, energy, and overall wellbeing.
description: Reflex Kitten Chicken & Rice 15kg is a high-quality, complete, and balanced dry food carefully crafted to meet the nutritional needs of kittens during their vital growth stages. This premium diet features tender chicken protein and wholesome rice , providing the perfect balance of energy, strength, and nourishment. Designed to promote healthy growth, immunity, and vitality , this large 15kg economy pack is ideal for pet parents with multiple kittens or those seeking long-lasting, cost-effective nutrition without compromising on quality. Core Nutritional Advantages High-Quality Protein for Development Made with real chicken as the main protein source, Reflex Kitten provides essential amino acids that build strong muscles, support bone formation, and enhance overall body growth. Energy-Rich Fats for Vitality With 20% crude fat , this formula ensures your kitten stays energetic throughout the day. These healthy fats contribute to skin elasticity and a soft, glossy coat . Omega 3 & 6 for Brain and Coat Health Infused with natural flaxseed , Reflex delivers a balanced ratio of omega 3 and 6 fatty acids to aid cognitive development , immunity , and fur shine — key indicators of kitten health. Enhanced Immune Protection A blend of beta-glucans, whey protein, and CitriStim strengthens your kitten’s immune defences, helping it resist infections and grow strong in its early months. Gentle Digestion and Odour Control Reflex Kitten Food includes mannan oligosaccharides (MOS) and yucca extract , promoting smooth digestion, better nutrient use, and reduced litter box odour — ensuring a clean, healthy environment. Vitamin and Mineral Enrichment Loaded with vital vitamins ( A, D, E, K, C, and B-complex ) and essential minerals like zinc, calcium, phosphorus, and selenium , this formula supports bone strength, organ function , and metabolic efficiency for complete growth support. Ingredients Processed animal protein, rice, corn, wheat, corn gluten, animal fat, brewer’s yeast, liver flavour, flaxseed, taurine, MOS (mannan oligosaccharides), beta-glucan, yucca, quillaja extract, and a balanced blend of fortified vitamins and minerals. Every ingredient is chosen to provide maximum digestibility and nutrient absorption , ensuring your kitten receives optimal care in every bite. Feeding Guidelines Feeding portions may vary depending on your kitten’s age, weight, activity level, and environment . Always: Adjust meal size to maintain a healthy body condition . Monitor appetite and stool quality for signs of proper digestion. Keep fresh drinking water available at all times. Store the food in a dry, cool location away from direct sunlight. Following these recommendations supports your kitten’s balanced growth and long-term well-being. Why Choose Reflex Kitten Chicken & Rice 15kg . Premium chicken protein for healthy growth and development .Supports digestion and immune strength naturally .Enriched with omega fatty acids for brain and coat health .Fortified with vitamins and minerals for total wellness .Great value 15kg pack perfect for multi-kitten households
